query:
-- 1. Quantos outliers existem e em quais grupos
SELECT rating, indexador, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(is_outlier) as outliers
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE data_referencia = (SELECT MAX(data_referencia) FROM spread_analysis)
GROUP BY rating, indexador
ORDER BY indexador, rating;
